compiled_state.title: Implement figma-api-fetch.sh: Figma REST API retrieval with PAT auth
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
## What
Implement plugins/dso/scripts/figma-api-fetch.sh that authenticates with Figma REST API using PAT and retrieves the full JSON node tree for a given file key.

## testing_mode: RED
New source file implementing new behavior. Depends on RED test task 2b42-6ff0.

## Interface
Input: figma-api-fetch.sh <file-key>
- Reads PAT from design.figma_pat in dso-config.conf (via read-config.sh), falls back to FIGMA_PAT env var
- Makes GET https://api.figma.com/v1/files/<file-key> with Authorization: Bearer <pat>
Output: Raw Figma JSON to stdout on success; exit 1 + error message to stderr on failure

## Implementation Steps
1. Source common helpers (parse_json_field, REPO_ROOT detection)
2. Read PAT: try read-config.sh for design.figma_pat, fallback to $FIGMA_PAT env var, exit 1 if neither set
3. Validate file key format (non-empty string)
4. Make curl request: curl -s -f --max-time 30 -H 'Authorization: Bearer <pat>' https://api.figma.com/v1/files/<key>
5. Handle exit codes: 22 (HTTP error) → parse response body for status code, emit re-provisioning msg for 401/403; 28 (timeout) → timeout error; 0 → pipe stdout through
6. Set executable bit (chmod +x)

## Files to Create
- plugins/dso/scripts/figma-api-fetch.sh (executable)

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] plugins/dso/scripts/figma-api-fetch.sh exists and is executable
  Verify: test -x plugins/dso/scripts/figma-api-fetch.sh
- [ ] bash tests/scripts/test-figma-api-fetch.sh exits 0 (all FA-1 through FA-5 pass)
  Verify: bash tests/scripts/test-figma-api-fetch.sh
- [ ] Script reads PAT from FIGMA_PAT env var when design.figma_pat is not set
  Verify: grep -q 'FIGMA_PAT' plugins/dso/scripts/figma-api-fetch.sh
- [ ] Script does not contain 'jq' (jq-free rule)
  Verify: ! grep -q '[^#]*jq' plugins/dso/scripts/figma-api-fetch.sh
- [ ] bash tests/run-all.sh exits 0
  Verify: bash tests/run-all.sh
